mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: This batch contains cancellation and enrollment flow page objects. While confirmation_page.py has enrollment-related elements, it is for the initial enrollment confirmation page, not for enrolling a printer with a specific plan via API or backend setup. The test case precondition requires backend/API setup to enroll a printer with a 50+ pages plan, which is not covered by UI page objects in this batch. Enrollment setup methods may exist in API helper files in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: No API helpers or verification methods found in this batch to check or ensure subscription has no free months. This batch contains only UI page objects for cancellation and enrollment flows. Subscription state verification methods would be in API helper files in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: No API helpers or verification methods found in this batch to check or set subscription status to 'subscribed'. This batch contains only UI page objects. Subscription status verification and setup methods would be in API helper files in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: While cancellation_page.py contains a pause_plan_link locator ([data-testid='pause-plan-link']), this is within the cancellation retention section and is used during the cancellation flow to offer pause as an alternative to cancellation. The test case precondition requires pausing the plan as a setup step before viewing the Print and Payment History page, which is a different context. The pause_plan_link in this batch is for the cancellation flow, not for the initial pause setup required by the test case. Additionally, no CIT modal elements or 'Pause Instant Ink' link from the main dashboard were found in this batch. The page objects needed for this precondition (InstantInkDashboardPage or CITModalPage) are not in this batch.

test_case_mappings.no_match_reason: Test case C44873414 is about verifying the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on the Print and Payment History page for a paused subscription plan. The test requires navigation to Print and Payment History page, verification of billing cycle card elements, complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages progress bar, tooltips, page usage tracking, and responsive testing across devices. This batch contains 5 page objects focused entirely on cancellation and enrollment flows: CancellationBannerPage (for cancellation banner with resume functionality), CancellationPage (comprehensive cancellation flow with retention offers), CancellationTimelinePage (cancellation timeline display), ChangePlanCancellationPage (plan changes during cancellation), and ConfirmationPage (enrollment confirmation). None of these page objects represent the Print and Payment History page or contain locators for billing cycle period card, complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages progress bar, page usage text elements, or any of the UI elements required by the test case. While cancellation_page.py contains a pause_plan_link, this is within the cancellation retention section and is used to offer pause as an alternative during cancellation, not for viewing pause plan billing information. The test case requires a completely different page (PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage) with billing cycle display elements, which are not present in this batch. The page objects needed for this test case (PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage, InstantInkDashboardPage) and all related billing cycle UI elements are likely in different batches containing print history, payment history, or dashboard page objects.
